name: Sauerbraten Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix beef, milk, bread crumbs, cloves, allspice, salt and pepper.
2. Form the mixture into meatballs.
3. Brown the meatballs in hot oil. Drain off any excess fat.
4. Add 1 cup water, vinegar, ginger, bay leaf, and brown sugar to the pan.
5. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Skim off any remaining fat from the liquid.
7. Remove the meatballs and keep them warm.
8. Mix flour with 2 tablespoons of water to create a gravy.
9. Slowly stir the gravy into the pan juices.
10. Pour the gravy over the meatballs.
11. Serve with buttered noodles.
